title: trace.active_driver_chain.request

clk_period.description: Clock period for half-period value comparison, e.g. '10ns' (default '10ns')
clk_period.x-description-zh: Clock period for half-period value comparison, e.g. '10ns' (default '10ns')

time.description: 查询或验证的目标时间点。
time.x-description-zh: 查询或验证的目标时间点。

time_unit.description: 仅解释不带单位的时间数字；带单位时间字符串优先，auto 不改变带单位值。
time_unit.x-description-zh: 仅解释不带单位的时间数字；带单位时间字符串优先，auto 不改变带单位值。

limits.description: Resource limits for the recursive active trace

max_depth.description: Maximum recursion depth through pass-through assignments and aliases (default 8)

max_nodes.description: Maximum number of trace nodes before truncation (default 50)

max_alias_candidates.description: Maximum number of alias candidates to explore (default 8)

max_trace_signals.description: Maximum signal count for value lookup (default 64)

description: Trace an active-driver chain across multiple levels.
x-how_it_works: 从 signal/time 递归追溯 active driver；深度限制写 top-level limits.max_depth。
x-arg_contract_notes: required: signal, time; do not use args.depth

use_when: 需要执行该 action 的 catalog 所述能力。
do_not_use_when: 任务不属于该 action 的公开合同。
constraints: required: signal, time; do not use args.depth
